zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Lindsay於1352年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓時，他的父親Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byres26歲，母親Christiana Mure of Abercorn24歲。他於1375年12月27日與Christiana Keith在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1414年7月1日在蘇格蘭Linlithgowshire阿爾可享年62歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Lindsay于1352年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓时，他的父亲Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byres26岁，母亲Christiana Mure of Abercorn24岁。他于1375年12月27日与Christiana Keith在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1414年7月1日在苏格兰Linlithgowshire阿爾可享年62岁，埋葬在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Lindsay was born in 1352, in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byres, was 26 and his mother, Christiana Mure of Abercorn, was 24. He married Christiana Keith on 27 December 1375, in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 1 July 1414, in Abercorn, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, at the age of 62, and was buried in Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Lindsay est né en 1352, à Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byres, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Christiana Mure of Abercorn, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Christiana Keith le 27 décembre 1375, à Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 1 juillet 1414, à Abercorn, Linlithgowshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Haddingtonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Lindsay 1352 in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byres 26 und seine Mutter Christiana Mure of Abercorn 24. Er hat am 27. Dezember 1375 in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Christiana Keith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Juli 1414 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Abercorn, Linlithgowshire, Scotland und wurde in Haddingtonshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Lindsay è nato il nel 1352 nel Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byres, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Christiana Mure of Abercorn, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Christiana Keith il 27 dicembre 1375, nel Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 luglio 1414, nel Abercorn, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Lindsayが1352年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハッドイントンで生まれた時，父Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byresは26歳，母Christiana Mure of Abercornは24歳であった。1375年12月27日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハッドイントンでChristiana Keithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1414年7月1日にスコットランドLinlithgowshireアバーコルンで62歳で死去し，スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Lindsay(이)가 1352년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byres(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Christiana Mure of Abercorn(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1375년 12월 27일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하딩턴에서 Christiana Keith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1414년 7월 1일 스컷랜드 Linlithgowshire 압르코른에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 하딩토실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Lindsay nasceu em 1352, em Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byres, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Christiana Mure of Abercorn, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Christiana Keith em 27 de dezembro de 1375, em Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de julho de 1414, em Abercorn, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Lindsay родился в 1352 г. в местности хаддингтон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byres было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Christiana Mure of Abercorn, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Christiana Keith 27 декабря 1375 г. в местности хаддингтон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 1 июля 1414 г. в местности абиркорн, Linlithgowshire, Шотландия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности хаддингтоншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Lindsay nació en 1352, en Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byres, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Christiana Mure of Abercorn, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Christiana Keith el 27 de diciembre de 1375, en Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de julio de 1414, en Abercorn, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Haddingtonshire, Scotland.
